mapper.sql: m.id, m.object_key, m.original_name, m.media_type, m.extension, m.size_bytes, m.width, m.height, m.sha256, m.alt_text, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.content_markdown LIKE CONCAT('%', m.object_key, '%') ) THEN 'ACTIVE' ELSE m.status END AS status, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.content_markdown LIKE CONCAT('%', m.object_key, '%') ) AS reference_count, m.created_by, m.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM media_asset m WHERE m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM media_asset WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM media_asset m WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE media_asset SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM article a WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.content_markdown LIKE CONCAT('%', media_asset.object_key, '%') )
